title: Expand Installer Module Unit Tests
description: Implement comprehensive unit tests for installer sub-modules (version-manager, file-copier, validator) following TESTING_GUIDE.md patterns. Target: Add 45+ test cases covering all public methods, edge cases, and error handling paths. Tests should follow Pure Logic Strategy with Jest mocks for file system operations.

criteria: 3 new test files created: version-manager.test.js, file-copier.test.js, validator.test.js
45+ test cases total across all 3 modules
All tests pass: npm test -- installer (exit code 0)
Coverage >= 80% for each module: npm test -- --coverage
convergence.verification: ls packages/ccc-state-controller/tests/*.test.js | wc -l = 4 && npm test -- installer 2>&1 | grep 'passed'
convergence.definition_of_done: All installer sub-modules have comprehensive unit test coverage following TESTING_GUIDE.md patterns

files.change: New test file for version-manager module (15+ test cases)
New test file for file-copier module (15+ test cases)
New test file for validator module (15+ test cases)

implementation.title: Create version-manager.test.js
implementation.description: Implement unit tests for version-manager module covering compareVersions, readPackageVersion, readVersionFile, writeVersionFile, checkForUpdate, getInstalledVersion, setInstalledVersion, getCorePackageVersion
modification_points: Implement 15+ test cases organized in describe blocks: Lifecycle/Singleton, Core Logic, State Management, Edge Cases
Mock fs.existsSync, fs.readFileSync, fs.writeFileSync for file operations
Test version comparison: 1.0.0 vs 1.0.1, 1.0.0 vs 2.0.0, equal versions, null versions
logic_flow: Load TESTING_GUIDE.md patterns for Pure Logic Strategy
Create test file with jest.mock('fs') before imports
Add describe blocks for each function category
Implement test cases with beforeEach for mock reset
Add edge case tests for null, undefined, invalid version formats

implementation.title: Create file-copier.test.js
implementation.description: Implement unit tests for file-copier module covering copyFile, copyDirectory, restoreBackup, cleanBackups, installCorePackage
modification_points: Implement 15+ test cases for file operations
Mock fs methods: existsSync, copyFileSync, mkdirSync, readdirSync, unlinkSync
Test scenarios: file not found, overwrite=false, backup creation, recursive directory copy
logic_flow: Mock fs module with jest.mock before import
Create describe blocks: copyFile, copyDirectory, restoreBackup, cleanBackups
Test backup path generation with timestamp
Test recursive directory copying with exclude patterns
Test error handling for permission denied, disk full scenarios

implementation.title: Create validator.test.js
implementation.description: Implement unit tests for validator module covering validateFile, validateTypeScriptFile, validateInstallation, validateVersionFile, validateFullInstallation, getInstalledFiles, checkInstallationStatus
modification_points: Implement 15+ test cases for validation logic
Mock fs for file existence and content checks
Test REQUIRED_FILES array validation, version format validation
logic_flow: Mock fs module before import
Create describe blocks for each validation function
Test file validation: exists, isFile, not empty
Test TypeScript validation: has exports, no syntax error markers
Test version file validation: valid semver format
Test getInstalledFiles recursive file discovery

implementation.title: Verify all tests pass
implementation.description: Run all installer tests and verify coverage thresholds
modification_points: Run npm test -- installer to execute all installer tests
Verify 45+ total test cases across 4 test files (existing + 3 new)
Check coverage report for >= 80% on each module
logic_flow: Execute test suite
Review test output for any failures
Generate coverage report
Fix any failing tests or coverage gaps

pre_analysis.action: Load context package for artifact paths and smart context
Load TESTING_GUIDE.md for canonical test patterns
Load existing installer.test.js and test-helper.js for pattern reference
Load installer source modules to understand function signatures

artifacts.usage: Canonical test patterns for Pure Logic Strategy, mock setup, describe organization

rationale.test_count: 45+ cases ensures comprehensive coverage of all public methods and edge cases
rationale.module_priority: version-manager first (no dependencies), then file-copier and validator (independent)

risks: File system mocking complexity - mitigate by following existing test-helper.js patterns
